payload.answer: SQL query execution is disabled. Direct database queries are not permitted when BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is false. Use standard memory retrieval APIs instead.
citations: Brain security policy: debug SQL requires explicit enablement

entity_resolution.reason: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false prevents direct SQL access to memory system

Request memory cards through standard API endpoints
